title: Using LabVIEW Overview
description:
Using LabVIEW Overview

Overview

The new library of LabVIEW VI has the following features.

High
	 level interface to Epson RC+ 8.0 using VIs (Virtual Instruments).

The
	 user no longer needs to deal with the .NET interface to Epson RC+
	 8.0 ? it is handles automatically.

Each
	 Spel command is wrapped in an individual VI.

The
	 VIs are organized in several Tool Palettes.

Supports
	 both 32 bit and 64 bit LabVIEW applications.

Supports
	 LabVIEW versions 2009 and greater.

To use the LabVIEW VI library, you must purchase an license of RC+ API software for each Controller that you connect with.
